g.text: One Sig enum, two grammars (F-A) — funding formers (g | #P | s∘s) vs the value/capability type-logic

g.data-qualified-name: Capability . value type-logic .F-A. NOT funding formers.
g.text: Capability / value type-logic (F-A: NOT funding formers)

g.text: funding_sig is built only from { Unit, Ground, Quote, And };
the six connectives ⊕ & ! ? ⊸ (and Threshold, per F-A §2(A))
reflect to the value/type layer, never to Σ⟦s⟧ (F-A).
rejected at the funding chokepoint — F-A
(reflect to the value / type layer instead)
